name: Oğurlanmış arzular
overview: Kenan, who works at a car service station, loses his son. Kenan blames himself for his son's death. Kenan loves Aysel, the daughter of his neighbor Amina. They love each other. However, Amina does not want them to meet. Events lead to the fact that one day their love ends. Aysel gets a job at Elnur's holding. Kenan does not agree to Aysel working at the holding. Aysel continues to work to pay off Kenan's debts.
